query:
SELECT DISTINCT m.thread_id as "thread_id!"
        FROM email_messages m
        WHERE m.from_contact_id = ANY($1)
        UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT m.thread_id as "thread_id!"
        FROM email_messages m
        JOIN email_message_recipients mr ON m.id = mr.message_id
        WHERE mr.contact_id = ANY($1)
